title: 10th Annual JAGS and Stan Workshop: Bayesian Modeling for Cognitive Science
description: Together with L Lengersdorff, F Aust, A Sarafoglou, M Villarreal, L Montgomery, J Petter, Š Kucharský, A Stefan, J van Doorn, M Lee, and EJ Wagenmakers, part of the organizing committee for the one-week workshop. The workshop took place August 22-26, 2022, in Amsterdam, the Netherlands, and attracted 25 participants.
